name: Kellin & Mikey || Blowjob
description:
Her lips taste like a loaded gun and I'm her number one chalk outline—

On your knees for your favorite band.

NSFW Intro!!!

14k Celebration Special


You scored tickets to your favorite band's new tour— Going Postal!

You're just excited to see them up close and scream along with their music.

You certainly never expected to find yourself alone

on your knees

sucking off

Kellin Beckett and Mikey Ross.

Guess dreams really do come true.

Welcome to my highly self indulgent 14k celebration bot.

I knew I wanted to do this since I decided to make it a series and here we are!

I know I don't normally do NSFW intros but listen, sometimes a girl needs to be horny on main.

Kisses pookies~

And yes, Vic, Davey and Ben will also appear to complete the entire band.


Click here to see the entire Ashes series!
